heading: Yucaipa Valley regional water supply renewal project
label: 390h–38 Yucaipa Valley regional water supply renewal project

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Yucaipa Valley Water District, may participate in the design, planning, and construction of projects to treat impaired surface water, reclaim and reuse impaired groundwater, and provide brine disposal within the Santa Ana Watershed as described in the report submitted under .section 390h–4 of this title

children.heading: Cost sharing
children.label: b Cost sharing
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of the project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost of the project.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: Funds provided by the Secretary shall not be used for operation or maintenance of the project described in subsection (a).

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $20,000,000.
